svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="ssr-goals-and-stack" id="ssr-goals"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-167" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP_A" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="SSR 改造核心目标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="420" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AHUB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="SSR 改造
核心目标" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="58" width="160" x="170" y="86" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心诉求 1
提升 SEO 友好度
支持搜索引擎抓取" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="60" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心诉求 2
缩短首屏白屏时间
提升用户体验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="260" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="A3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="核心诉求 3
保障多终端、多语言
适配稳定性" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="160" y="320" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="GRP_B" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f0fdfa;strokeColor=#5eead4;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#134e4a;spacingTop=6;" value="技术选型" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="420" x="520" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="BHUB" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ccfbf1;strokeColor=#14b8a6;fontColor=#134e4a;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="技术选型

Nuxt.js 3 + Vue3
+ TypeScript" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="540" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="B2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="服务端
